nodes.name: Hirundo
nodes.summary: Hirundo（Hirundo）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联16种鸟类，如Blue swallow、Black-and-rufous swallow、Pied-winged swallow等16种鸟类。

nodes.name: White-bibbed swallow
nodes.summary: White-bibbed swallow（Hirundo nigrita）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如White-bibbed swallow。

nodes.name: White-bibbed swallow
nodes.summary: The white-bibbed swallow (Hirundo nigrita), also known as the white-throated blue swallow, is a species of bird in the family Hirundinidae. It is widespread across the African tropical rainforest (Dahomey Gap also). References
nodes.shortSummary: The white-bibbed swallow (Hirundo nigrita), also known as the white-throated blue swallow, is a species of bird in the family Hirundinidae.…
